mapper.insert: INSERT INTO residence_history (residence_history_id, employee_id, dormitory_id, room_id, move_in_date, move_out_date, move_out_reason, usage_type_code, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{residenceHistoryId}, #{employeeId}, #{dormitoryId}, #{roomId}, #{moveInDate}, #{moveOutDate}, #{moveOutReason}, #{usageTypeCode}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE residence_history SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId}, room_id = #{roomId}, move_in_date = #{moveInDate}, move_out_date = #{moveOutDate}, move_out_reason = #{moveOutReason}, usage_type_code = #{usageTypeCode}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE residence_history_id = #{residenceHistoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE residence_history SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE residence_history_id = #{residenceHistoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT residence_history_id, employee_id, dormitory_id, room_id, move_in_date, move_out_date, move_out_reason, usage_type_code, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM residence_history WHERE residence_history_id = #{residenceHistoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM residence_history WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND move_in_date <= COALESCE(#{asOfDate}, CURRENT_DATE) AND (move_out_date IS NULL OR move_out_date >= COALESCE(#{asOfDate}, CURRENT_DATE))

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM residence_history WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND move_in_date <= COALESCE(#{asOfDate}, CURRENT_DATE) AND (move_out_date IS NULL OR move_out_date >= COALESCE(#{asOfDate}, CURRENT_DATE))

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM residence_history WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND daterange(move_in_date, COALESCE(move_out_date, 'infinity'::date), '[]') && daterange(#{moveInDate}, COALESCE(#{moveOutDate}, 'infinity'::date), '[]')
AND residence_history_id <> #{excludeId}

SELECT f.first_use_date, e.employee_category, e.name AS employee_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN employee_first_dorm_use f ON f.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE e.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COALESCE(SUM( (COALESCE(move_out_date, CURRENT_DATE) - move_in_date + 1) ), 0)::int FROM residence_history WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT e.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, f.first_use_date, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, f.first_use_date))::int AS elapsed_years, d.name AS dormitory_name, r.room_name FROM employee_first_dorm_use f JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = f.employee_id AND e.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN residence_history rh ON rh.employee_id = e.employee_id AND rh.deleted_at IS NULL AND rh.move_out_date IS NULL LEFT JOIN dormitory d ON d.dormitory_id = rh.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN room r ON r.room_id = rh.room_id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, f.first_use_date)) >= #{thresholdYears} ORDER BY f.first_use_date LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT d.dormitory_id, d.name AS dormitory_name, d.address, d.postal_code, d.region, r.room_id, r.room_name, r.room_detail, r.has_air_conditioner, rh.residence_history_id, rh.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, COALESCE(a.name, CASE WHEN e.employee_category = 'JAPAN' THEN '日本社員' WHEN e.employee_category = 'CHINA_ASSIGN' THEN '中国出張' ELSE '-' END) AS affiliation_name, CASE WHEN dm.dormitory_id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS is_manager, rh.move_in_date, rh.move_out_date FROM residence_history rh JOIN dormitory d ON d.dormitory_id = rh.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN room r ON r.room_id = rh.room_id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = rh.employee_id AND e.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN affiliation a ON a.affiliation_id = e.affiliation_id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN dormitory_manager dm ON dm.residence_history_id = rh.residence_history_id WHERE rh.deleted_at IS NULL AND rh.move_in_date <= #{monthEnd} AND (rh.move_out_date IS NULL OR rh.move_out_date >= #{monthStart})
AND (e.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') OR rh.employee_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%'))
ORDER BY d.name, r.room_name, e.name

SELECT rh.residence_history_id, rh.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, d.name AS dormitory_name, COALESCE(r.room_name, r.room_detail) AS room_name, rh.move_out_date, (rh.move_out_date - #{asOfDate})::int AS days_remaining FROM residence_history rh JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = rh.employee_id AND e.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN dormitory d ON d.dormitory_id = rh.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN room r ON r.room_id = rh.room_id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rh.deleted_at IS NULL AND rh.move_out_date IS NOT NULL AND rh.move_out_date >= #{asOfDate} AND rh.move_out_date <= (#{asOfDate} + (#{warningDays} * INTERVAL '1 day')) ORDER BY rh.move_out_date, rh.residence_history_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM residence_history rh WHERE rh.deleted_at IS NULL AND rh.move_out_date IS NOT NULL AND rh.move_out_date >= #{asOfDate} AND rh.move_out_date <= (#{asOfDate} + (#{warningDays} * INTERVAL '1 day'))
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM residence_history WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT residence_history_id, employee_id, dormitory_id, room_id, move_in_date, move_out_date, move_out_reason, usage_type_code, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM residence_history WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY move_in_date ASC, residence_history_id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT residence_history_id, employee_id, dormitory_id, room_id, move_in_date, move_out_date, move_out_reason, usage_type_code, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM residence_history WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND move_in_date <= #{asOfDate} AND (move_out_date IS NULL OR move_out_date >= #{asOfDate}) ORDER BY move_in_date ASC, residence_history_id ASC LIMIT 1
